overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a concrete drainage channel in an industrial outskirts setting from Cyberpunk 2077. The camera moves from under a highway overpass through a graffiti-covered concrete channel littered with trash bags and abandoned vehicles, featuring a hazy, warm desert-like atmosphere with dramatic shadows.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete drainage channel under highway overpass

events.description: exits the shadow of the overpass into direct sunlight
moves from covered structure into open air channel

agents.ego_description: walking steadily forward from under the concrete overpass into the open drainage channel

entered.detail: large concrete highway overpass with metal support beams overhead
tall concrete wall with colorful graffiti murals
angled concrete embankment with patches of dry grass
metal watchtower structure with ladder on the right embankment
shallow water covering the concrete channel floor reflecting the sky

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a massive concrete highway overpass in a drainage channel. The camera moves forward from shadow into sunlight, revealing a graffiti-covered retaining wall on the left and a sloped concrete embankment on the right with a distant guard tower. The ground is wet with shallow water reflecting the structure above.

scene_state.functional_zone: open concrete drainage channel with graffiti walls

events.description: slight turn to the right while continuing forward along the channel

agents.ego_description: walking along the channel passing the guard tower and approaching abandoned vehicles on the right

notable_agents.action: abandoned derelict cars and trucks scattered along the right embankment

entered.detail: rusted derelict cars and trucks scattered along the right embankment
large colorful graffiti art featuring cartoon characters on the retaining wall

segments.scene_description: Now in the open channel under a hazy sky, the camera walks past a metal guard tower on the right while approaching abandoned vehicles scattered along the embankment. The left wall features prominent colorful graffiti murals. The ground remains concrete with puddles reflecting the bright sunlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: trash-strewn drainage channel with abandoned vehicles

events.description: passing large piles of blue and black garbage bags on the right embankment

agents.ego_description: continuing forward through the channel, approaching the trash piles and the concrete wall at the end

notable_agents.action: rusted abandoned vehicles parked among trash piles

entered.detail: large mounds of blue and black garbage bags piled on the concrete slope
distant concrete overpass blocking the end of the channel

segments.scene_description: The camera moves deeper into the channel where large piles of garbage bags accumulate on the right embankment among abandoned vehicles. A concrete bridge structure becomes visible in the distance marking the end of the channel. The graffiti-covered wall remains prominent on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: end of drainage channel with massive trash accumulation

events.description: turns sharply right to face the large trash pile on the embankment
turns back left to continue toward the concrete wall at the channel's end

agents.ego_description: pausing to examine the trash pile on the right, then continuing toward the concrete wall at the channel's end

entered.detail: tall modern street lamp visible above the embankment

segments.scene_description: Approaching the end of the channel, the camera turns right to closely inspect a massive pile of garbage bags on the embankment, then turns back toward the concrete bridge structure that blocks the channel's end. The graffiti-covered wall is now very close on the left, and the ground shows wet patches reflecting the hazy sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a concrete drainage channel that transitions from the deep shadows of an overpass into a bright, hazy industrial wasteland. It begins beneath a massive highway structure, moving forward from the shade into sunlight to reveal a graffiti-covered retaining wall and a sloped embankment with a distant guard tower. As the camera advances into the open channel, it passes the metal tower and moves toward abandoned vehicles scattered along the concrete, while the ground reflects the bright sky in shallow puddles. The scene then deepens as the camera approaches large piles of garbage bags and a distant concrete bridge that marks the end of the path. Finally, the camera turns right to closely inspect the accumulated waste on the embankment before pivoting back toward the blocking bridge structure under the hazy light.
